examples: The meeting produced the usual bromides about macroeconomic policy, third-world debt and the environment.

There were even claims that IT had improved the performance of the service sector significantly, although macroeconomic measures of productivity did not reflect the improvement.
They are trying to take basic microeconomic ideas and apply them to more complex macroeconomic situations.
Also, the macroeconomic data for U.S. seems to be positive for the most part.
